title: Personal Financial Advisors
description: Advise clients on financial plans using knowledge of tax and investment strategies, securities, insurance, pension plans, and real estate. Duties include assessing clients' assets, liabilities, cash flow, insurance coverage, tax status, and financial objectives. May also buy and sell financial assets for clients.

tasks.text: Interview clients to determine their current income, expenses, insurance coverage, tax status, financial objectives, risk tolerance, or other information needed to develop a financial plan.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze financial information obtained from clients to determine strategies for meeting clients' financial objectives.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Answer clients' questions about the purposes and details of financial plans and strategies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review clients' accounts and plans regularly to determine whether life changes, economic changes, environmental concerns, or financial performance indicate a need for plan reassessment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Manage client portfolios, keeping client plans up-to-date.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend to clients strategies in cash management, insurance coverage, investment planning, or other areas to help them achieve their financial goals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend financial products, such as stocks, bonds, mutual funds, or insurance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Implement financial planning recommendations, or refer clients to someone who can assist them with plan implementation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Contact clients periodically to determine any changes in their financial status.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare or interpret for clients information, such as investment performance reports, financial document summaries, or income projections.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Explain to clients the personal financial advisor's responsibilities and the types of services to be provided.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Investigate available investment opportunities to determine compatibility with client financial plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Guide clients in the gathering of information, such as bank account records, income tax returns, life and disability insurance records, pension plans, or wills.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor financial market trends to ensure that client plans are responsive.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recruit and maintain client bases.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Meet with clients' other advisors, such as attorneys, accountants, trust officers, or investment bankers, to fully understand clients' financial goals and circumstances.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Devise debt liquidation plans that include payoff priorities and timelines.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Open accounts for clients, and disburse funds from accounts to creditors as agent for clients.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inform clients about tax benefits, government rebates, or other financial benefits of alternative-fuel vehicle purchases or energy-efficient home construction, improvements, or remodeling.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend environmentally responsible investments, such as cleantech, alternative energy, or conservation technologies, companies, or funds.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct seminars or workshops on financial planning topics, such as retirement planning, estate planning, or the evaluation of severance packages.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
